name: codex-sdlc
description: A review-gated software delivery pipeline for Codex with specialized planning, implementation, verification, and walkthrough subagents.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, implement, verify, and review changes
interface.longDescription: Turn a product brief into requirements, architecture, phased implementation, independent verification, browser-ready walkthroughs, and a final engineering handoff using Codex runtime subagents.
defaultPrompt: Run the full SDLC pipeline for this feature brief.
Help me turn this product idea into a structured brief.
